hero.title: Discover scents that define your story
hero.description: Explore a curated collection of fine perfumes — from timeless classics to modern masterpieces, chosen for every moment.

brandStory.title: Fragrance as an art form, not a commodity
paragraphs: Scentora was born from a simple belief: a great perfume is not just worn — it's remembered. Every bottle we curate carries a story of craftsmanship, rare ingredients, and the quiet confidence that comes from wearing something extraordinary.
We work only with houses that treat perfumery as an art, pairing timeless technique with modern sensibility — so every scent you discover here feels considered, never generic.
brandStory.quote: A signature scent is the one thing people remember long after you've left the room.

discovery.title: Find your fragrance family
discovery.description: Every scent belongs to a family. Explore ours and discover the one that feels like you.

curated.title: Curated Selection
curated.description: Every fragrance is hand-picked for quality, character, and lasting impression.

authentic.title: Authentic Products
authentic.description: Shop with confidence — only genuine perfumes from trusted sources.

experience.title: Personalized Experience
experience.description: Find your signature scent with expert guidance and thoughtful recommendations.

showcase.title: Featured Perfumes
showcase.description: Handpicked fragrances that capture the essence of luxury

items.text: Scentora has transformed how I discover perfumes. The curated selection is unmatched.
items.author: Sarah Mitchell

items.text: Authentic products and exceptional service. I trust Scentora for every purchase.
items.author: James Chen

items.text: The personalized recommendations helped me find my signature scent. Highly recommended!
items.author: Emma Roberts

cta.title: Begin your fragrance journey
cta.description: Join thousands of scent enthusiasts who trust Scentora for their next favorite perfume.
